---
mode: agent
description: "Type Enter to see what you can do"
---

# Menu

Show the user this menu of available commands:

---

Here's what I can help you with:

| Command | What it does |
|---------|-------------|
| `/connect` | Type Enter to connect ServiceNow or Workday to your agent |
| `/create` | Type Enter to create a new topic or workflow |
| `/update` | Type Enter to modify an existing topic or workflow |
| `/delete` | Type Enter to delete a topic or workflow from your agent |
| `/scan` | Type Enter to scan your agent for compile errors and fix them |
| `/evaluate` | Type Enter to generate evaluation test sets for your agent |
| `/flightcheck` | Type Enter to run a pre-deployment readiness check |
| `/push` | Type Enter to push all local changes to Copilot Studio |
| `/troubleshoot` | Type Enter to diagnose connectivity or auth errors |

Tip: Switch to **Plan** mode (type `/plan`) if you'd like to brainstorm or discuss changes before making them.

Note: `/setup` is intentionally not listed here - it runs once during initial environment setup. To re-run it (which replaces your local agent files), type `/setup` directly.

Type `/menu` anytime to see this again, or just describe what you'd like to do in plain English.

---

If the user asks a follow-up question or describes a task, help them. Do NOT just repeat the menu.
